ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "subject_group" TEXT /* Group to which the subject belongs */,
  "subject_language" TEXT /* Primary language of the subject */,
  "subject_education_level" TEXT /* Educational background of the subject */,
  "subject_medical_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject participating in the session */,
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Session number for the subject */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "session_time" TEXT /* Time of the session */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utterances" (
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utterance */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session in which the utterance was recorded */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speaker of the utterance */,
  "utterance_text" TEXT /* Text of the utterance */,
  "token_count" INTEGER /* Number of tokens in the utterance */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of utterance (e.g., conversational, narrative) */,
  "mlu" REAL /* Mean Length of Utterance */,
  "utterance_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the utterance was made */,
  "utterance_emotion" TEXT /* Emotion expressed in the utterance */,
  "utterance_intonation" TEXT /* Intonation pattern of the utterance */,
  "utterance_accent" TEXT /* Accent or dialect characteristics of the speaker */,
  "utterance_audio_file" TEXT /* Reference to the audio file of the utterance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utterance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utterances_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utterances_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_type" TEXT /* Type of the speaker (e.g., Participant, Clinician) */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the speaker */,
  "speaker_age" INTEGER /* Age of the speaker */,
  "speaker_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the speaker */,
  "speaker_education_level" TEXT /* Educational background of the speaker */,
  "speaker_profession" TEXT /* Profession of the speaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "researcher_email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "researcher_role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead, assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource the permission applies to (e.g., subjects, sessions, utterances) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_permissions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
